channel.title: PostgreSQL on Alexey Evlampiev
channel.description: Recent content in PostgreSQL on Alexey Evlampiev

item.title: Decoupling Compute and Storage in Postgres: The Architectural Implications of Databricks Lakebase
item.description: A vendor-neutral analysis of how Databricks Lakebase and the broader serverless PostgreSQL convergence fundamentally change what we can assume about database deployments.

item.title: Why We Are Still Getting Database Deployments Wrong in 2026: The Limits of External State Management
item.description: A technical analysis of why external migration tools structurally fail during complex PostgreSQL deployments, and what the alternative architecture looks like.
